KNIFEHERO-KUNAI.title: Kunai
KNIFEHERO-GAY_BLADE_STRIKE.title: Strike
KNIFEHERO-GAY_BLADE_DEFEND.title: Defend
KNIFEHERO-KNIFE_IN_FRONT.title: Knife in Front
KNIFEHERO-KNIFE_IN_FRONT.description: Summon a Knife with 8 HP. While it lives, enemy attacks against you hit the Knife instead.
KNIFEHERO-FANCY_FOOTWORK.title: Fancy Footwork
KNIFEHERO-FANCY_FOOTWORK.description: Deal 6 damage and feed Top (gain 1 Strength). If this is in your hand at the end of your turn, gain 5 Block and feed Bottom (gain 1 Dexterity). Top and Bottom are sword-pets that stand in front of you.
KNIFEHERO-RAINBOW_STRIKE.title: Rainbow Strike
KNIFEHERO-RAINBOW_STRIKE.description: Deal 2 damage for every Flag you have.
KNIFEHERO-VANISH.title: Vanish
KNIFEHERO-PRIDE_WAS_A_RIOT.title: Pride was a Riot
KNIFEHERO-PRIDE_WAS_A_RIOT.description: Remove all of the target's Block, then deal 5 damage.
KNIFEHERO-CORPORATE_SPONSORED_PRIDE.desc: Remove a Flag. If you did, gain 2 Energy.
KNIFEHERO-KNIFE_WHIP.title: Knife Whip
KNIFEHERO-KNIFE_WHIP.description: Deal 8 damage. Put a Kunai in your discard pile and reduce this card's damage by 1.
KNIFEHERO-THROWING_KNIFE.title: Throwing Knife
KNIFEHERO-THROWING_KNIFE.description: Deal 6 damage. If this deals HP damage, Exhaust it. If it doesn't, return it to your hand.
KNIFEHERO-THE_CLOSET.title: The Closet
KNIFEHERO-THE_CLOSET.description: Gain 3 Stealth. The next time you play an Attack, lose all Stealth.
KNIFEHERO-THE_DISCOURSE.title: The Discourse
KNIFEHERO-THE_DISCOURSE.description: If this is in your hand at the end of your turn, gain 1 less energy next turn. Exhaust.
KNIFEHERO-EXTREMELY_ONLINE.title: Extremely Online
KNIFEHERO-EXTREMELY_ONLINE.description: Gain 2 energy. Gain 2 energy at the start of each turn. Shuffle a Discourse into your draw pile.
At the start of each turn, put a copy of a Blade from your deck into your hand. It gains Exhaust and Ethereal.
KNIFEHERO-PRIDE_GOLEM.title: Pride Golem
KNIFEHERO-PRIDE_GOLEM.description: Destroy all your Flags and other Pets. Summon a Pet with twice that much HP. Whenever it takes damage, it deals that much damage back to the attacker.
KNIFEHERO-RECITE.title: Recite
KNIFEHERO-ANNOTATE.title: Annotate
KNIFEHERO-OPEN_BOOK.title: Open Book
KNIFEHERO-MARGINALIA.title: Marginalia
KNIFEHERO-MARGINALIA.description: Whenever you play a Book or a Power, gain 1 Lesson.
KNIFEHERO-POLYMATH.title: Polymath
KNIFEHERO-POLYMATH.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Lesson.
KNIFEHERO-GALVANISM.title: Galvanism
KNIFEHERO-SOLITUDE.title: Solitude
KNIFEHERO-WRETCHEDNESS.title: Wretchedness
KNIFEHERO-FIRE_STOLEN.title: Fire, Stolen
KNIFEHERO-RECOMBINANT.title: Recombinant
KNIFEHERO-RECOMBINANT.description: Deal 3 damage once for each Power you have.
KNIFEHERO-QUOTE_AT_LENGTH.title: Quote at Length
KNIFEHERO-QUOTE_AT_LENGTH.description: Deal damage equal to your Lessons.
KNIFEHERO-DONT_LOOK_AWAY.title: Don't Look Away
KNIFEHERO-DONT_LOOK_AWAY.description: Return a random card from your Exhaust pile to your hand. Take 2 grief damage.
KNIFEHERO-READ_THE_REMAINDER.title: Read the Remainder
KNIFEHERO-READ_THE_REMAINDER.description: Heal HP equal to the number of cards in your Exhaust pile.
KNIFEHERO-STONEWALL.title: Stonewall
KNIFEHERO-STONEWALL.description: Gain 10 Block. Each Flag attacks for 3.
KNIFEHERO-VEXING_MEMORY.title: Vexing Memory
KNIFEHERO-VEXING_MEMORY.description: Unplayable. If this is in your hand at the end of your turn, gain 1 Grief and take grief damage equal to your Grief.
